search_records.query: site:lastzwiki.com/en Last Z guide heroes research
search_records.searched_query: site:lastzwiki.com/en Last Z guide heroes research
search_records.search_notes: Restricted to lastzwiki.com pages only. Prioritized concrete guide/wiki pages over home pages. Single-page mechanics should still be cross-validated before any player-facing use.

results.title: Heroes - Last Z Wiki | Tier List, Stats & Complete Character Guide 2026
results.evidence_summary: Core hero index with roster, faction tabs, levels, and equipment; useful for hero discovery and cross-checking character names.
results.primary_user_job: Find hero roster details and hero equipment references.

results.title: Laboratory Badges in Last Z - Complete Research Guide | Last Z Wiki
results.evidence_summary: Research table page with category tabs and per-level badge costs; useful for locating research topics and cost structure.
results.primary_user_job: Find research categories and badge cost tables.

results.title: Beginner's Guide - Last Z Wiki | How to Start & Essential Tips 2026
results.evidence_summary: Starter guide covering early progression, first heroes, and basic systems; useful for broad onboarding context.
results.primary_user_job: Understand early-game progression and starter hero usage.

search_records.query: site:last-z.wiki Last Z heroes events research cost
search_records.searched_query: site:last-z.wiki Last Z heroes events research cost
search_records.search_notes: Search restricted to www.last-z.wiki returned no indexed results for the query. No discovery leads found within the allowed domain.
search_records.no_results_reason: No indexed pages matched the query on the allowed domain.

search_records.search_notes: No allowed-domain results were returned for the approved query. Search was restricted to lastz-command-center-one.vercel.app only, per policy.
search_records.no_results_reason: No indexed pages matched the domain-restricted query.

search_records.query: site:lastz.fandom.com Last Z heroes research events
search_records.searched_query: site:lastz.fandom.com Last Z heroes research events
search_records.search_notes: Search stayed within lastz.fandom.com and returned direct wiki pages related to events, heroes, and research-linked progression. Results are discovery leads only; single-page evidence is not enough to confirm player-facing mechanics.

results.title: Full Preparedness
results.evidence_summary: Daily event cycles include research-speed tasks and hero upgrade tasks; useful for cross-checking event categories and rewards.
results.primary_user_job: Identify daily event themes tied to research and hero progression.
claims_to_verify: Cycle themes and order by Apocalypse Time/day

results.title: Heroes
results.evidence_summary: Core hero overview page with hero classes and power factors; useful for entity discovery around hero systems.
results.primary_user_job: Map hero roster, classes, and power components.
claims_to_verify: Any links to research or event systems

results.title: Event Center
results.evidence_summary: Hub page for regular and special events; good entry point for locating event mechanics pages.
results.primary_user_job: Find where world events are organized and described.

search_records.search_notes: No matching Packsify pages were found for the approved query within the allowed domain filter. Search returned no results, so there are no discovery leads to report.
search_records.no_results_reason: No indexed Packsify URL matched the requested Last Z gear guide query under the required domain restriction.

search_records.search_notes: Search constrained to mmediamreza.com only. Results emphasize exact Last Z guide pages rather than generic homepages. One result is a weekly event lead; useful for discovery but not enough alone for player-facing mechanics. Off-topic or generic pages were not included.

results.title: Military Center Guide: Maximize Unit Cap & Base Power - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Building guide for the Military Center; covers unit cap, base power, unlock level, and refugee assignment.
results.primary_user_job: Plan base upgrades for troop cap and power growth.

results.title: Rider Camp Guide: Train & Promote Rider Units - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Unit training guide for Rider Camp; includes upgrade table with costs, cap, speed, and power by level.
results.primary_user_job: Compare Rider Camp upgrade efficiency and training output.

results.title: Weekly Lucky Number - Research Speed Bonu (May 18 - May 24) - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Timed weekly event page describing a specific rose-send trigger and a temporary research speed bonus.
results.primary_user_job: Check a short-lived event bonus and how to trigger it.
